step.title: Generate Auth Bootstrap goal (conditional, phase=auth-bootstrap)
step.rule: This step runs AFTER infrastructure (3.16) and BEFORE fixtures (3.17), controller actions (3.18), and auth flows (3.19) — every downstream auth/protected goal depends on the bootstrap goal, so it must exist first.
Emit the auth-bootstrap goal ONLY when N_auth_flows >= 1. When N_auth_flows == 0, SKIP entirely — downstream deps resolve to empty without error.
Security wiring is OWNED by this single goal — never leave security.yaml / User entity as a side-effect of the first auth flow goal (D3 determinism gate).
All inputs read from docs/architecture/* files and discovery output on disk (G-16), never from conversation context.

substep.title: Read auth-flow inventory and count flows
substep.action: Read docs/architecture/cross-cutting.md — the SAME auth-flow source used by step 3.19.1. Build the auth-flow inventory and count N_auth_flows.

check.action: Print: "No auth flows discovered (N_auth_flows == 0) — skipping auth-bootstrap goal. Downstream auth/action deps resolve empty."
SKIP this step entirely. Do NOT create any goal. Proceed to Step 3.17 (Fixtures).

substep.title: Resolve scaffold goal ID
substep.action: Read goals.yaml from disk. Find the goal with phase=scaffold — store its ID as SCAFFOLD_GOAL_ID.

check.action: ABORT with error: "Cannot generate auth-bootstrap goal: no scaffold goal (phase=scaffold) found in goals.yaml — ensure Step 2 ran first"

substep.title: Read auth method (session vs JWT)
substep.action: Read the auth method from docs/architecture/cross-cutting.md security section and the discovery `uses_jwt` flag (php-symfony/discovery.md §10a security, php-symfony/libraries.md `{{#uses_jwt}}`).
If uses_jwt is true → JWT identity provider via lexik/jwt-authentication-bundle + keypair generation. If false → Symfony session/form-login authenticator.
substep.rule: The library is resolvable by convention (`lexik/jwt-authentication-bundle` gated on uses_jwt, else `symfony/security-bundle`) — do not escalate unless the JWT choice is genuinely unknowable from project context.
substep.action: Resolve the User entity placement: the identity/auth BC named in discovery. If no dedicated identity BC exists, default to src/Share/ (Share-ownership convention) — do not invent a new BC.

substep.title: Compose acceptance criteria
substep.action: Build ACCEPTANCE array. AU-08 and AU-09 are OWNED here (relocated from the per-flow auth goals):

criteria.item: Security configuration uses Symfony security bundle properly (firewall, provider, authenticator in config/packages/security.yaml)
User entity has proper password hashing (bcrypt/argon2) and implements the security user interface
JWT keypair generated via bin/console lexik:jwt:generate-keypair and lexik config present at config/packages/lexik_jwt_authentication.yaml

playwright/auth.setup.ts logs in as admin and regular user using seeded credentials (env-var names from test-environment.md) and writes storageState JSON to playwright/.auth/admin.json and playwright/.auth/user.json (E2E-AUTH-STATE-CONV)

substep.rule: Include AB-JWT only when uses_jwt is true. Include AU-11 only when HAS_FRONTEND is true. AU-08/AU-09 are always present.

substep.title: Compose context with deliverables and Investigation Config

section.name: deliverables
section.deliverable: JWT config: config/packages/lexik_jwt_authentication.yaml + keypair via bin/console lexik:jwt:generate-keypair

Playwright auth setup: playwright/auth.setup.ts — logs in as admin and regular user using seeded credentials (env-var names from docs/architecture/test-environment.md, GM-05), writes storageState JSON to playwright/.auth/admin.json and playwright/.auth/user.json (E2E-AUTH-STATE-CONV)

section.name: investigation-config

investigator.name: Security config presence
investigator.pass: security.yaml and User entity exist; firewall/provider grep returns >= 1
investigator.fail: Missing security.yaml, missing User entity, or no firewall/provider config

investigator.name: Auth wiring check
investigator.pass: Exit 0 — JWT keypair/config valid (uses_jwt) or firewall configured (session)
investigator.fail: JWT config invalid or firewall not configured

investigator.name: Quality gates
investigator.commands: vendor/bin/phpstan analyse src/ --level=9 && vendor/bin/ecs check src/ && vendor/bin/deptrac analyse
investigator.pass: PHPStan, ECS, and Deptrac all exit 0
investigator.fail: Any tool reports errors or violations

section.rule: 3 investigators (GM-08 minimum is 2). Investigator 2's command is gated on uses_jwt (JWT key/config check vs firewall check).

substep.title: Create the auth-bootstrap goal via goal-create
substep.value: Auth endpoint controllers/DTOs/routes (built by per-flow auth goals 3.19), business logic beyond authentication, fixtures/seed users (built by fixtures goal), non-auth controller actions.

params.param: Auth bootstrap: security.yaml firewall/provider/authenticator + User entity with password hashing
ACCEPTANCE array from substep 3.16a.4 (AU-08, AU-09, + AB-JWT when uses_jwt)
Array of {name,type,paths,commands,pass,fail,condition?} objects built from substep 3.16a.5's investigators (3; types from the Reference Table).

substep.rule: depends_on=[SCAFFOLD_GOAL_ID] — bootstrap leans on the project skeleton + bundle install only.
substep.action: Store the returned goal ID as AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_GOAL_ID — used by substeps 3.18.2 (auth_required actions) and 3.19.2 (auth flows).

check.action: Print error with full context and ABORT.
Print: "Auth bootstrap created: goal-{NNN} (phase=auth-bootstrap, depends_on=[{SCAFFOLD_GOAL_ID}], uses_jwt={uses_jwt}) with 3 investigators, max_retries=3"
